note: First poll — baselines were V50.6 (2026-03-12). Site has undergone major overhaul to V51.0. The review project (CLAUDE.md) already tracks V51.0 and 67 WINs, so these changes were previously known to the team but the monitoring baselines had not yet been updated.
commit_classification: noise — all 10 commits are automated pipeline updates (GitHub Actions / ECM Auto-Pipeline), no manual author commits detected

priority_rationale: Massive structural overhaul V50.6→V51.0 with 28 new WINs, model rename, toroidal architecture, and new coordinate system. However, the review team already processed the V51.0 update (per CLAUDE.md). The most actionable new findings for the analyst are: (1) WIN-062 Tesla wave speed added 2026-04-04, (2) context page now acknowledges 4 falsified predictions, (3) ai-context URL moved, (4) evolution page shows V51.0 at only 62 WINs vs current 67 (internal inconsistency), (5) no references to our review detected.
